name: Payment frequency period multiplier—Leg 2
description: This data element reports payment frequency period information for leg 2 of the transaction, as an integer of the number of time units in the period.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required where a leg of a transaction is an interest rate leg.
Required if Payment frequency period—Leg 2 is reported as a value other than ADHO, and not reported otherwise.
Not-reported for Action types: TERM, EROR, PRTO
valueRules: Reported as 1 if Payment frequency period—Leg 2 is reported as EXPI.
If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications.
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types.
